# fileURL

**Instance Property**

The URL of the file that was received.

## Declaration

```swift
var fileURL: URL { get }
```

## Discussion

The system places downloaded files inside a temporary directory. If you intend to keep the file, it is your responsibility to move the file to a more permanent location inside your extension’s container directory. You must move the file before your session delegate’s [doc://com.apple.watchconnectivity/documentation/WatchConnectivity/WCSessionDelegate/session(_:didReceive:)] method returns.

## Getting the File Information

- **metadata**: A dictionary of additional information that was sent with the file.
